maproom.description: Semantic code search for indexed repositories

_comment: Configuration for Maproom MCP Server in Claude Desktop

setup: 1. Build the Maproom MCP server: cd packages/maproom-mcp && pnpm build
2. Replace '/absolute/path/to/maproom-mcp' with the actual absolute path to your maproom-mcp package
3. Update MAPROOM_DATABASE_URL with your PostgreSQL connection string
4. Ensure the PostgreSQL database is running and accessible
5. Index your repository using the maproom CLI before using the MCP server
6. Save this configuration to your Claude Desktop config file

MAPROOM_DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection string for Maproom database

LOG_LEVEL.description: Logging level (trace, debug, info, warn, error)

MAPROOM_MCP_LOG_FILE.description: Path to log file for MCP server logs (optional, logs to stderr if not set)

tools_available.name: status
tools_available.description: Check maproom index status - USE THIS FIRST to see what's indexed

tools_available.name: search
tools_available.description: Semantic code search across indexed repositories

parameters.filter: (optional) Filter by file type: all, code, docs, config

tools_available.name: open
tools_available.description: Retrieve specific code sections from indexed files

parameters.relpath: Relative path to the file (from search results)
parameters.worktree: Worktree name where the file is located

tools_available.name: context
tools_available.description: Retrieve contextually relevant code sections around a chunk

parameters.chunk_id: UUID of target chunk (from search results)

tools_available.name: upsert
tools_available.description: Update the code index for specific files

parameters.paths: Array of file paths to index
parameters.root: Root directory path of the repository

tools_available.name: explain
tools_available.description: Generate detailed symbol card for a code chunk (EXPERIMENTAL)

parameters.chunk_id: Chunk ID to explain (from search results)

connection_failed: Verify MAPROOM_DATABASE_URL is correct and PostgreSQL is running
Check that the maproom database schema is initialized
Ensure network connectivity to PostgreSQL server
Check firewall settings if using remote database
no_results_in_search: Use 'status' tool first to verify repository is indexed
Run maproom CLI to index your repository
Check that worktree parameter matches indexed worktrees
server_not_starting: Check that the path to dist/index.js is correct and absolute
Verify Node.js is installed and accessible
Check MCP log file for error details
Ensure all dependencies are installed (run pnpm install)
Rebuild the server (pnpm build) if code was modified
tools_not_appearing: Check server is not 'disabled' in config
Verify JSON configuration file is valid (no syntax errors)
Check Claude Desktop logs for server initialization errors

beginner.step_1_check_status: Use the 'status' tool to see what repositories are indexed
beginner.step_2_simple_search: Search with simple terms like 'authentication' or 'database connection'
beginner.step_3_open_file: Use 'open' tool with relpath and worktree from search results

intermediate.filtered_search: Use filter parameter to search only code files (filter: 'code')
intermediate.context_gathering: Get context around a function using 'context' tool with chunk_id from search
intermediate.targeted_worktree: Limit search to specific branch/worktree to narrow results

advanced.multi_step_workflow: Search → Context → Open related files → Explain symbols
advanced.index_updates: Use 'upsert' after making code changes to re-index specific files
advanced.custom_expansion: Configure 'expand' parameter in context tool to control related chunks
